docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF PARI KHOSLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FLOAT SPAS INCORPORATED IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN RASTEGAR, OWNER. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION - OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO JUSTIN RASTEGAR ON 01/17/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FLOAT SPA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: COMPLIANCE WITH STATE LAW CONCERNING THE REGISTRATION OF FICTITIOUS BUSINESS NAME. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOSLA, PARI DBA FILLMORE LAUNDROMAT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHOSLA, PARI DBA FILLMORE LAUNDROMAT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLOAT SPA $708.10 PRINCIPAL, $18.43 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $756.53, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $708.10 PLUS COSTS AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AT THE STATUTORY RATE FROM 7/23/2018. I FIND IMPERFECT BUT SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE WITH THE FICTITIOUS NAME STATUTES; PLAINTIFF HAS REGISTERED "FILLMORE LAUNDRY" BUT APPARENT DOES BUSINESS AS "FILLMORE LAUNDROMAT". STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO APPEARANCES BY THIRD PARTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PROTEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FLOAT SPA
DECLARATION RE: ADDITION OF JUSTIN RASTEGAR (OWNER OF FLOAT SPA) AS THIRD PARTY IN OEX FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOSLA, PARI DBA FILLMORE LAUNDROMAT
ORDER OEX OFF CALENDAR. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 29, 2019. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED, AND SET FOR NEW TRAIL HEARING DATE OF MAY-31-2019 AT 10:00 AM.M IN DEPT. 506. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER AFTER HEARING AND NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO JUSTIN RATEGAR ON 3/29/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO APPEARANCES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED (THIRD PARTY DEFENDANT) AS TO THIRD PARTY RASTEGAR, JUSTIN HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE & NEW HEARING DATE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-26-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MUST PRESENT A DECLARATION THAT HE HAS COMPLIED WITH THE FICTITIOUS BUSINESS NAME LAWS IN ORDER TO RECOVER. SEE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PARI KHOSLA. DEFENDANT FLOAT SPA DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF FILED THE DECLARATION AS PER THE JUDGE'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FLOAT SPA HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 5-31-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $708.18 FILED BY KHOSLA, PARI DBA FILLMORE LAUNDROMAT AS TO DEFENDANT FLOAT SPA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
